summary: ANDROID| Falcon | Custom EQ - Save button do not work for Falcon Custom
scenario: Custom EQ slider settings are not saved after pressing Save EQ button on Falcon device
description_clean: When a user sets Custom EQ sliders for a Falcon device and clicks the Save EQ button (confirming with the dialog), the slider settings are not saved. Upon reopening the Custom EQ settings, the sliders revert to default values. Additionally, there is a minor issue with the dialog description text that needs fixing.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Tap on the connected Falcon device to open Device Settings
Adjust any of the EQ sliders (e.g., Bass, Treble) to non-default values
Verify the dialog description text is correct
Tap Confirm / Save on the dialog
Reopen Audio Settings → Equalizer → Custom EQ
expected: The Custom EQ slider settings should be saved and persist. Upon reopening Custom EQ, the sliders should reflect the previously saved values. The confirmation dialog description text should be accurate and properly formatted.
actual: The Custom EQ slider settings are not saved. Upon reopening Custom EQ, the sliders revert to default values. Additionally, the confirmation dialog description text has a minor issue that needs fixing.
